archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalist Kinetic Energy
reasoning: The user explicitly requested a MORE LIVELY AND ANIMATED UI for the ApnaGhr app. Moving away from standard, boring corporate real estate apps to a tactile, kinetic 'Neo-Brutalist' pastel approach. This makes the platform feel like a fun, premium consumer product with high engagement, perfect for property hunting, booking movers, and buying ads.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Overlapping elements for kinetic feel.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Dashboards) with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) but bold borders.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: bg-white border-2 border-[#111111] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#111111] rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 hover:translate-x-[-2px] hover:translate-y-[-2px] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#111111]
surfaces_and_borders.buttons_primary: bg-[#FF5A5F] text-white border-2 border-[#111111] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#111111] rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#ff4449] active:translate-y-[2px] active:translate-x-[2px] active:shadow-[0px_0px_0px_#111111] transition-all

components.navigation: Floating bottom nav for mobile (Crystal Glass style). Desktop gets a sticky header.
components.property_card: Image takes top 60%, bottom 40% has bold title, price, and a vibrant 'Hot' badge (#FFD166) overlapping the image border. Card must use the solid shadow hover effect.
components.packages_list: Horizontal scroll with 'snap-x' or CSS Grid. Movers packages (Basic, Standard, Premium, Elite, Intercity) use distinct pastel background colors (Mint, Peach, Lavender, Lemon, Sky Blue) with solid black borders.
components.marquee: Use a marquee for the 'Advertise With Us' brands/partners or animated text like 'GROW YOUR BUSINESS • PREMIUM ADS • REACH RENTERS' using react-fast-marquee.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Slide up and fade in (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Tactile 'push down' effect for buttons. Cards lift up and cast a larger solid shadow.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Kinetic spinning geometric shapes, avoiding standard spinners.

assets.icons: lucide-react with 2px stroke width to match the neo-brutalist border style.

accessibility.contrast: Extremely high due to 2px black borders and solid shadows.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-movers-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (primary: #FF5A5F, secondary: #4ECDC4, accent: #FFD166, surface: #FFFFFF, border: #111111).
Import Outfit and DM Sans fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or index.css. Do NOT use Inter.
Apply the Neo-Brutalist card styles globally for Shadcn cards (border-2 border-[#111111] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#111111] rounded-xl).
For 'Packers & Movers' and 'Advertise With Us', create dedicated animated sections. Use framer-motion for staggering the appearance of the 5 moving packages and 4 ad packages.
Ensure the mobile bottom nav floats with backdrop-blur-xl and a solid top border.
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections. NEVER use placeholder text or dummy image URLs.
Replace the existing muted colors with this vibrant, highly animated kinetic theme to perfectly hit the user's request for a lively app.
